title: Create full internal UserManual coverage for Atelier, CKC, Posekit, Ingest, Facial, Argus, and prompt feedback
operator_request: Update the Handshake internal manual so operators and models know how to use CKC, Posekit, Ingest, Argus, Facial-backed tools, and prompt feedback workflows.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: This is the broad manual consolidation MT. It does not replace per-MT manual updates required by implementation MTs.

scope.summary: Create a coherent no-context internal manual section for the full Atelier tool family and model/operator workflows.
base_scope: Document the Atelier main panel and its CKC, Posekit, and Ingest tabs.
Document CKC character sheets, media/albums, search/tags/notes, story, moodboard, and linked artifacts at the current implementation level.
Document Posekit split view, marker editing, OpenPose export, and ComfyUI use at the current implementation level.
Document Ingest dataset review, contact sheets, and Facial-backed tools at the current implementation level.
Document Argus visual inspection requirements and methods.
Document prompt feedback/kernel workflow once implemented or clearly mark current status and recovery path.
Add manual-content tests so key method names and workflows cannot drift silently.
acceptance_criteria: A no-context model can open the internal manual and understand the purpose, navigation, inputs, outputs, safety constraints, failure modes, and recovery steps for Atelier tools.
Manual text does not claim unimplemented behavior as complete.
Manual tests guard the presence of key tool names, methods, and workflows.
Argus usage is described as mandatory for GUI proof.
verification: Argus/manual pane visual inspection if available headlessly.
Diff review against implemented status to avoid false claims.

manual_requirement: This MT is itself manual coverage; later implementation MTs still update manual deltas.
